meaning: n.废物,赌输的一注,废话vi.掷骰子
examples: Let's cut the crap and get down to business.
You're talking a load of crap !
I look down and I'm standing next to a pile of crap!
The manufacturers put that stuff on PCs and then the user puts Itunes, spyware, adware, and other crap that runs at startup and bogs down their pcs.
If Wall Street stopped the mortgage originators and not passed on that crap to investors and Fannie and Freddie much sooner, this crisis could have been abated.
